anchors.value: 11 artifacts, 5 phases, 9 commands: /new-project → /research → /discuss → /spec → /roadmap → /plan-phase → /execute-phase → /verify-phase → /audit-milestone → /complete-milestone. 12 schemas exist, only 4 wired. Target: full pipeline from idea to deployed product.

.hivemind/planning/ is the canonical location for GSD-style planning SOT artifacts. NOT .planning/. Planning lives inside hivemind state directory. Structure must be modular (not monolithic) — separate concerns for sessions, tasks, sub-tasks, lib/tools/hooks/schema domains. Each document must be grounded in evidence from prior scans, not littered without context lookup.
